title: Create+ [Neo/Forge]
body:
Time to power up your brain and start **Creating**! Build **trains**, automated **farms**, send **packages**, store **XP** in **Fluid Tanks**, make **Auto-Enchantng** farms, generate **electricity** & **so much more**! Now Feauautring Create v6!

# What is this?
Adds **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**, it´s best addons & more quality-of-life mods. 

# Socials:
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2XzK42Dr5J)\
[Twitter / X](https://x.com/Jonkl7937)

### Create add-ons:
[Create: Copper & Zinc](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-copper-zinc), [Create: Deep Dark](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deep-dark), [Create: Trimmed](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-trimmed), [Create: Ultimate Factory](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ultimate-factory), , [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice), [Create: Framed](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-framed), [Create Jetpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-jetpack), [Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles), [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry), More to come **SOON**! I need to wait for the mods to become Create v6 compatible...

### Other mods:
[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), [Jade Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-forge), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched), [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations), [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium), [Embeddium (Rubidium) Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium-extra), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) + [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), [Cubes Without Borders (Borderless Fulscreen)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders), [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), [Wi Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)

### Libraries:
[Cristel Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/cristel-lib)

# Supported versions:
**NeoForge 1.20.1**\
**[Fabric 1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jonklscreatemodpack)**

# Issues:
Report bugs & issues to the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2XzK42Dr5J) or the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Not-Awake-Studios/Create/issues).
If you want to ask something, e-mail jonkl@jonkl.net.

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

Q: I **cannot generate superflat** worlds.\
A: **Disable Terralith** in the Modrinth app.\

</details>

# Loaders:
You need the Modrinth App to use the modpack. Not planning to add CurseForge support anytime soon.

### Made by [**Not Awake Studios**](https://modrinth.com/organization/NotAwakeStudios).
